'''Newsnet terminals''' were public terminals that were used to access local news networks. They could be found in public places such as [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] waiting lounges or along public streets in busy city sectors. They could either display news items in a typographical fashion on a computer screen or project a [[Hologram/Legends|hologrammic]] image of a news presenter, who would deliver an audio report.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*{{GalaxiesAED}}
